facebook.caption:
POV: you skip the resort beach for one afternoon and end up in Rạch Hàm.

Ham Ninh is a real fishing town. Weathered wooden piers. Crab pots stacked high. Boats that actually work for a living.

4.1 stars across 1,004 reviews says tourists who find it, rate it. The ones who don't find it stay poolside wondering why Phu Quoc felt generic.

Grab seafood straight off the docks. Walk TL47 slow. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Wooden piers, working boats, zero beach chairs. Ham Ninh fishing town hits different when every other visitor is eating crab by the water and you finally understand what Phu Quoc looked like before the resorts.

instagram.caption:
Took the turn onto TL47. Found Ham Ninh. Real fishing boats, real crab, 1,004 reviews.

This is Phu Quoc before the resorts.

Save this.
